scope: Pass B full-surface review against Linkrunner's SDK-less API reference plus the legacy Data API package. The two Data API endpoints implemented by legacy remain covered as read streams. Linkrunner's documented SDK-less endpoints are POST-only client-device telemetry/attribution calls that require a body-carried project token and device/install context; they are not syncable object lists and the declarative write dialect cannot safely inject a secret into a JSON body, so they are excluded with endpoint-specific reasons.

excluded.reason: client SDK install/open telemetry call; it acknowledges attribution processing for a device install and is not a syncable object stream or reverse-ETL data mutation

single-install polling endpoint requiring a body-carried project token and install_instance_id/device context; not a GET list/detail resource and not expressible as a safe declarative stream without placing a secret in the request body
client-side signup/login attribution event requiring per-device install_instance_id and body-carried project token; not a practical reverse-ETL write action for this Data API connector
client-side user attribution metadata update requiring body-carried project token and device install context; dialect cannot safely source the project token into a JSON body
client event telemetry endpoint, not a syncable resource; requires body-carried project token and app-device context outside the connector credential model
payment/revenue telemetry with ad-network side effects; requires body-carried project token and per-user payment context outside this connector's approved reverse-ETL write surface
removes captured payment attribution for refunds and can affect revenue attribution state; not safe as a generic declarative reverse-ETL action
device push-token telemetry endpoint requiring install_instance_id and body-carried project token; not a server-side data sync resource
client-side third-party analytics ID telemetry requiring device install context and body-carried project token; not a practical reverse-ETL object mutation
client deeplink-open handling endpoint for remarketing/reattribution; returns processing status, not persisted objects to sync
